description: Litmus output schema. All review CLIs must produce output conforming to this schema.

status.description: PASS if zero issues or only low severity. FAIL if any high or medium severity issues.

file.description: Relative file path from repository root.

line.description: Line number where the issue occurs. Use 0 only for file-level issues.

severity.description: high: bugs, security vulnerabilities, data loss risks. medium: performance issues, error handling gaps. low: style, naming, minor maintainability.

description.description: Clear, specific description of the issue. Reference the actual code.

suggestion.description: Concrete fix suggestion with code example when possible.

confidence.description: How confident you are this is a real issue (0-100). Omit if uncertain.

source.description: Origin of the finding. Set automatically by SAST tools, not by the LLM reviewer.
